name: Break Through the Compression Bottleneck: From Theory to Practice

description: arXiv:2607.20434v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: As the parameter size of language models continues to grow, effective model compression is required to reduce their computational and memory overhead. Existing compression methods suffer from bottleneck issues: when the compression ratio is increased, performance degrades significantly. Low-rank decomposition and quantization are two prominent c...
author: Xiusheng Huang, Lu Wang, Yequan Wang, Jun Zhao, Kang Liu
